name: @realvendex/pi-cache
description_en: Pi-native runtime cache and memoization toolkit for pi.dev extension tools: deterministic cache keys, TTL/SWR policies, tag/namespace invalidation, optional local persistence.
description_zh: pi.dev 扩展工具的 Pi 原生运行时缓存和记忆化工具包：确定性缓存键、TTL/SWR 策略、标签/命名空间失效、可选本地持久化
